diagrams.title: Java Heap Memory Layout
diagrams.description: Shows the division of heap memory into Young Generation (with Eden and Survivor spaces) and Old Generation
diagrams.purpose: Understand how memory is organized and where objects are allocated initially

diagrams.title: Mark and Sweep Algorithm
diagrams.description: Visual representation of the two-phase garbage collection process
elements: Heap with marked and unmarked objects
diagrams.purpose: Understand how GC identifies and reclaims unused memory

diagrams.title: Object Promotion Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the lifecycle of objects moving through generations
elements: Minor GC - survivor moves to Survivor space
After surviving multiple Minor GCs - promoted to Old Generation
Objects in Old Generation collected during Major/Full GC
diagrams.purpose: Understand object lifetime and promotion between generations

diagrams.title: GC Roots Overview
diagrams.description: Illustrates what constitutes GC roots in Java
diagrams.purpose: Understand which objects are always considered reachable
